payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it has been superseded, so it should not be shown as a current fact.
payload.decision: recall returned mem_new because it is the current non-superseded memory for Sam from Goldman; mem_old was filtered because it is marked as superseded and should not be presented as current

entity_resolution.reason: The query referred to Sam from Goldman, which matched the same entity context used by the active memory mem_new. No new entity needed to be created.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new was returned as the active memory for Sam from Goldman.
mem_old was not returned because it is superseded by a newer memory and is therefore not current.

details: Did not present mem_old as a current fact.

repair_options: If mem_old was incorrectly marked as superseded, remove or revise the supersession link.
If mem_new is incorrect, update or delete mem_new and re-evaluate whether mem_old should become current again.
If Sam from Goldman is ambiguous, split or merge entity records as appropriate before recall.
